data.title: Praxis Precision Medicines, Inc. announced a $525 million public offering: 3,025,480 shares at $157.00 per share.
data.description: Praxis Precision Medicines, Inc. has priced its underwritten public offering of 3,025,480 shares of common stock at $157.00 per share and pre-funded warrants for 318,470 shares at $156.9999 each. The gross proceeds from the offering are expected to be approximately $525 million. There is also an option for underwriters to purchase an additional 501,592 shares. The offering is set to close around October 20, 2025. Praxis aims to develop therapies for CNS disorders related to neuronal excitation-inhibition imbalance.

data.title: Gold's market cap hits $30T, surpassing Bitcoin and tech giants. Its price surges, setting a new record high. Analysts foresee Bitcoin as the next milestone.
data.description: The cost of gold has surged to a record-breaking high, reaching a new peak in market capitalization. Analysts are now speculating that Bitcoin may be the next asset to experience a similar trend.

data.title: 16K new developers joined Ethereum in 9 months, making it top choice for devs over Solana and Bitcoin.
data.description: Recent data from Electric Capital shows a trend in which a large number of cryptocurrency developers are gravitating towards the Ethereum platform, with a significant number also turning their focus to Solana and Bitcoin. This information suggests that Ethereum is attracting the most developers, followed by Solana and Bitcoin, reflecting the changing landscape of the crypto development community.
Boost Private Sector, Reduce Taxes, Says Syria’s Finance Minister

data.title: Investors are improving at identifying questionable Bitcoin treasuries: David Bailey asserts firms must have a clear advantage to launch.
data.description: According to a Bitcoin treasury executive, firms holding Bitcoin assets are hesitant to launch without a significant advantage, amidst growing concerns about a possible bubble in the market. This statement comes as the debate surrounding the digital currency's sustainability and value intensifies. The executive suggested that companies are cautious about initiating any new projects or investments related to Bitcoin unless they have a distinct competitive edge to leverage. This sentiment reflects the uncertainty prevailing in the market, with many scrutinizing the current valuation and future prospects of Bitcoin.

data.title: Lexeo Therapeutics sets the price for its public offering and concurrent private placement.
data.description: A recent report reveals that the unemployment rate in the United States has reached a record low of 3.5%. This marks the lowest rate in the past 50 years, with a significant decrease from the previous rate of 3.7%. The economy also added 136,000 jobs in September, surpassing expectations despite concerns about a global economic slowdown. The job gains were seen in healthcare, professional services, and government sectors, while manufacturing and retail industries experienced a decline in job growth. Additionally, average hourly wages saw a slight increase of 2.9% from the previous year, continuing a trend of modest wage growth. Overall, the labor market in the U.S. appears to remain robust, with strong job creation and low unemployment rates.

data.title: Mexico's Richest Predicts Bitcoin surpassing Gold in value, projecting $1.516 Million per BTC if it hits $30 trillion market cap.
data.description: Mexican billionaire Ricardo Salinas Pliego made a bold prediction, stating that Bitcoin will surge by at least fourteen times, equating to $1.516 million, surpassing gold’s market cap milestone of $30 trillion. Salinas, Mexico’s third-wealthiest individual, emphasized Bitcoin’s potential to outperform gold in the future. With Bitcoin’s current circulating supply at 19.93 million, if it reaches $1.516 million per coin, its market value will exceed $30 trillion. Salinas encouraged readers to remember his statement, suggesting significant growth potential for Bitcoin. For the full story, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: GAC showcases technology and culture at 138th Canton Fair with three strategic models - AION UT, S7, and HPYTEC.
data.description: In Guangzhou, China, the 138th Canton Fair kicked off with a lavish ceremony on October 15, 2025. The event, themed "Where Craft Meets Technology," saw GAC showcasing three key models - AION UT, S7, and HPYTEC - demonstrating technological prowess. The fair, a prominent trade event, attracted a significant number of attendees and industry professionals looking to engage with cutting-edge products and innovations.

data.title: Bitcoin treasury firms should only launch if they have a clear advantage, says exec. Debate over potential bubble escalates.
data.description: According to a Bitcoin treasury executive, firms holding Bitcoin in reserve have minimal incentive to launch without a distinct advantage. This statement comes amidst increasing discussions about whether there is a bubble forming in the market.

data.title: GrantWatch connects nonprofits to thousands of foundation grants during the 2025 government shutdown, offering critical support.
data.description: GrantWatch is stepping in to bridge the gap for nonprofits during the ongoing federal government shutdown. The program, located in Boynton Beach, Florida, is providing vital support by linking organizations to numerous foundation and private grants. With government aid on hold, this lifeline is crucial for nonprofits facing stalled programs and uncertain staff situations. GrantWatch's services offer access to thousands of grants, offering much-needed assistance during this challenging time.
